reviews.comment:
En esta estación de servicio, un cliente cargo combustible solo, un empleado dijo que es porque es un antiguo cliente, le dije si sabía cargar porque derramó combustible a lo que contestó que yo paseaba para pelear. Me pareció muy mal educado, y ponen en riesgo la vida de los demás.

(Translated by Google)
At this gas station, a customer filled up his tank alone. An employee said it was because he was a long-time customer. I asked him if he knew how to pump gas because he spilled fuel, to which he replied that I was just out to fight. I thought it was very rude, and it put other people's lives at risk.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfX2UyVHNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para los socios del ACA viajeros sirve para poder hacerle el mantenimiento y el acarreo si es necesario... En la zona cercana a la ciudad hay señal y más de 40 km ya no.

(Translated by Google)
For ACA members traveling, it allows them to have their vehicle serviced and towed if necessary... There is signal in the area near the city, but not beyond 40 km.
